title: feishu_form_fill_submit
description: Phase 2 of filling the built-in preset Feishu questionnaire. ONLY call this AFTER `feishu_form_fill_prepare` returned draft answers and a human has approved or corrected them with no new free-form supplement. If the user adds new data in natural language, rerun phase 1 instead. You MUST pass the exact `draft_session_id` from phase 1.

draft_session_id.description: REQUIRED. The exact draft_session_id returned by feishu_form_fill_prepare. This is a single-use token that expires after DRAFT_SESSION_TTL_SEC (default 1800s).

human_confirmation_notes.description: Optional human review notes to apply before submission.

confirmed_answers.description: Optional field-level overrides for answers returned by phase 1.

index.description: Target field index from the phase-1 draft.

field_key.description: Stable internal key from the phase-1 draft, such as name / attendance_time / attendance_count.

field_label.description: Target field label from the phase-1 draft.

normalized_values.description: Structured option values for single-select or multi-select fields.

clear_value.description: Set true to intentionally clear a drafted answer.

field_ids.description: Optional Feishu form field id mapping for rebuilt or non-preset forms. Omit to use the built-in preset mapping.

name.description: Feishu field id for 姓名, for example fldRiWDs6J.

attendance_time.description: Feishu field id for 参会时间, for example fldMwK92Ml.

attendance_count.description: Feishu field id for 人数/参会人数, for example fldROl771Y.

headless.description: Whether to run the browser in headless mode.

profile_id.description: Server-side stored auth profile id. If omitted, the service falls back to FEISHU_DEFAULT_PROFILE_ID.

storage_state.description: Playwright storage state JSON object for an already logged-in Feishu session.

storage_state_path.description: Path to an existing Feishu storage state file inside the container.

sensitive_data.description: Optional Browser Use sensitive_data payload for login assistance.
